questionHtml:
30 g of an organic compound produces 44 g CO2 and 18 g H2O as the only combustion products. Which of the following is the empirical formula for this compound?

Mr CO2 = 44 Mr H2O = 18

A.  CH2

B.  CH3

C.  CHO

D.  CH2O
